metadata.description: Evidence-based clinical guidelines from WHO, CDC, and major medical associations.

guidelines.summary: Focus on lifestyle modification: DASH diet, sodium reduction (<2300mg/day), and regular aerobic activity (150 min/week).
guidelines.holisticFocus: Stress management (mindfulness/yoga) is recommended as a complementary approach to reduce sympathetic nervous system activity.

guidelines.summary: Target HbA1c < 7% for most adults. Emphasis on metformin as first-line therapy and individualized carbohydrate monitoring.
guidelines.holisticFocus: Screening for 'Diabetes Distress' and depression at every visit due to the heavy psychological burden of chronic self-management.

guidelines.summary: Combination of pharmacotherapy (SSRIs/SNRIs) and psychotherapy (CBT/IPT) is more effective than either alone for moderate to severe cases.
guidelines.holisticFocus: Exercise and sleep hygiene are essential physiological foundations for neuroplasticity and mood regulation.
